Issue #8 — Week of April 20, 2026

Your weekly edge,
delivered.

📬 Wolfpack Edition  ·  Sales Enablement
🎙 Listen to this issue
~4 min · OpenAI Shimmer ⓘ First time only: audio is generated on demand via OpenAI. This may take up to 30 seconds. Subsequent plays are instant.
0:00 --:--
TL;DR 4 updates this week
→
Sierra chat launcher refreshed — now visible on all pages (not just Settings/Help) and draggable. Easier access to support, more visible AI help experience.
→
Mobile app sign-in screen updated — new Homebase-branded splash screens. Heads-up for the field: customers will notice a new first-run experience.
→
Clover + Homebase now includes embedded scheduling — stronger all-in-one positioning vs. Square & Toast. Bigger platform story for reps to lead with in live deals.
→
Outbound Blitz is becoming a formal daily/weekly motion — beta now active. Expect clearer expectations, coaching, and performance visibility for reps and managers.
⚙️ CS Ops / Product
UI Update

Updated Sierra Chat Launcher on Web

Sierra's support chat launcher has been refreshed on web — it now appears across all pages and is draggable, giving users more control without blocking what they're working on.

Full chat panel — expanded state
Draggable launcher — repositioned by user
Proactive AI prompt — contextual tooltip
🆕
What changed: The launcher now appears across all pages, not just Settings or Help. Previously it was hidden on most pages because it took up too much space and couldn't be repositioned.
🖱️
Draggable: Users can move the launcher anywhere on screen without blocking what they're doing — removes the main objection to keeping it visible at all times.
💬
Sales talk track: "Easier access to support" — especially useful when positioning Homebase's AI/help experience as more visible and modern inside the product.
Owner: Josh Levitan / CS Ops · View Slack announcement →
UI Update

Updated Mobile App Sign-In Screen

The mobile splash and sign-in screens are being refreshed to better match the Homebase brand and set the foundation for future sign-in and sign-up flow improvements.

New mobile splash — updated Homebase branding
📱
What changed: Sign-in and splash screens are being visually modernized. The current experience looked dated — this refresh sets the foundation for future sign-in and sign-up improvements.
👀
Heads-up for the field: Customers may notice a new first-run mobile experience when opening the app. This is expected — no action needed from reps.
🛠️
Internal: God Mode / Dev Options now opens by tapping the version number at the bottom of the sign-on screen 6+ times.
📣 PMM
GTM Planning

Clover Adding Embedded Scheduling — Competitive Positioning Sharpened

Scheduling is joining time tracking and time clock inside Clover. PMM is sharpening the talk track to compete directly against the all-in-one narrative from Square and Toast.

Homebase scheduling embedded inside the Clover dashboard
⚔️
Why it's happening: Competitors are winning mindshare by claiming the all-in-one workforce management story. PMM is repositioning Clover + Homebase so reps can tell a bigger platform story, not just a feature story.
💬
Core message: Clover is not just payments plus add-ons — it's increasingly a true all-in-one team management platform. Scheduling + time tracking + time clock = a real workforce management suite.
🎯
For live deals: Use this to handle competitive objections against Square and Toast more confidently. Lead with the platform story, not the feature list.
Owner: Linda Horn / PMM · Strong competitive talk track — directly useful in live deals against Square and Toast.
📊 RevOps / Sales
Beta Motion

Outbound Blitz — Now a Formal Sales Motion

Outbound Blitz is now a beta motion with daily blitz activity, enablement support, and analytics underway. Blitzing is becoming a structured part of the daily and weekly sales routine.

GTM OS — Blitz mode with switcher talk track and account context
🚀
What's live: Daily blitz activity, enablement support, and analytics work are underway — paired with outbound base calling micro-learning and improvements based on beta tester feedback.
🎯
The goal: Increase access to opportunities and give sales a structured way to prospect into the base — supported by continued training, blitz mode improvements, and eventual dialer enhancements.
📈
For reps and managers: Blitzing is no longer a one-off activity. Expect it to become a more formal part of the daily/weekly motion — with clearer expectations, coaching, and performance visibility.
Clear rep behavior change: If you're in the beta group, your feedback is directly shaping how this motion develops — keep logging it.

📂 Past Issues

April 13, 2026 · Issue #7
Cash Out Simulator · Hiring Manual Mode · Activity Feed · Android Time Clock · Hiring Playbook · PAR POS · Dynamic Opp V2.1
Issue #7
▼
⚙️ CS Ops
New Feature
Cash Out Simulator Live for Internal Demos
Walk through the full Cash Out request and repayment flow without real banking info. Built for demo prep, training, and objection handling.
New Feature
Hiring Manual Mode — Now Free
Customers can post jobs and manage candidates without paying for AI features. Answer for price-sensitive customers; clean upsell path into Hiring Assistant.
UI Update
Hiring Assistant Activity Feed
New Activity Feed on every job logs every assistant action — texts, screeners, top matches, bookings. Kills the black box objection with a live audit trail.
UI Update
Android Time Clock Rebuilt
Modernized experience, improved reliability. Same job to be done, stronger foundation underneath.
UI Update
Verification Now in Profile — Passwordless Coming May 31
Passwords replaced with one-time codes after May 31. Status indicators now visible in user profile with direct path to verify email or phone.
Experiment
New Left-Hand Navigation Experiment
Rolling out to new accounts in Phase 1. Simplified manager web experience — same features, cleaner nav structure.
📣 PMM
New Resource
Hiring Sales Playbook V1 Delivered
Structured flows, discovery questions, ROI positioning grounded in recent Sales syncs. Internalise the discovery questions — designed to surface pain quickly.
GTM Planning
PAR POS Integration Advancing
Franchise-first story led by Scooter's Coffee demand. 300 locations is the initial success target. Lead with the franchise story, not the technical integration.
GTM Planning
Clover Story Sharpened — Discoverability Is the Real Pain
Sharper message: merchants are still wasting weekly admin time and discoverability is still broken — Homebase fixes both. Ground in real pain, not feature lists.
📊 RevOps
Engagement Phase
Dynamic Ownership V2.1 — Engagement Focus
72-hour meaningful connection rule now in effect. Stricter move-back rules, stronger cadence discipline. Feedback from inception team shaped this.
Attribution Audit
Talkdesk Attribution Edge Cases Under Review
RevOps auditing cases where Talkdesk activity may misattribute ownership or MRR credit. Flag anomalies directly to RevOps.
April 6, 2026 · Issue #6
Hiring Dealbreakers · Tax Status · Anon Removed · Messaging GTM · Dynamic Ownership V2.1
Issue #6
▼
⚙️ CS Ops
New Feature
Hiring Dealbreaker Presets Live (Apr 1)
5 preset categories screen applicants before review: Age/Legal, Availability, Certifications, Physical Ability, Transportation. Top Match = pass all dealbreakers AND screener. Binary logic in V1.
UI Update
New "Submitted" Tax Filing Status (Mar 31)
Sits between Pending and Filed. Full progression: Pending → Submitted → Filed. Failed = always actionable by employer. Closes confusion gap when filings appeared stuck.
Functionality Update
Anon Integration Removed from Payroll Setup (Apr 3)
Anon was a third-party integration used to authenticate with providers like Gusto and transfer employee data into Homebase. Removed from new-customer self-serve flow. Existing payroll customers unaffected.
Internal Tooling
Change Tier → Active Admin (Apr 10–17)
Tier change workflow moving from Reactive Admin modal to new Active Admin form. Shows saved payment methods and Stripe-hosted link flow. Internal ops heads-up only.
📣 PMM
GTM Launch
Refreshed Messaging GTM Launched Apr 6
Unread tab and all-location communications went live. Be ready to reinforce: clearer message visibility, easier follow-up, stronger cross-location communication.
Campaign
Hiring Assistant Social Proof Campaigns (Apr 7)
St. Pete Athletic story targeting non-trial customers and trial users who haven't converted. Expect improved customer familiarity with the Hiring Assistant story.
GTM Planning
PAR POS + Clover GTM Advancing
PAR POS integration GTM moving toward launch. Clover sales enablement meeting completed to sharpen all-in-one messaging. Better materials coming for partnership-led motions.
📊 RevOps
Beta Support
GTM OS Active Beta — Keep Logging Bugs
Multiple fixes shipped for false "All Caught Up" states, stuck actions, cadence loops. RevOps treating this as a beta period — your bug reports are directly driving fixes.
Beta Program
Blitz Mode Small Beta + Base Prospecting Micros
Small beta group of Switchers. Micros focused on prospecting into the base and GTM OS Blitz Mode best practices running over 1–2 weeks.
Rollout
Dynamic Ownership V2.1 Rolled Out Apr 8
DOV2.1 stabilizes the motion, tightens SLA and cadence expectations, improves attribution/tracking visibility. Talkdesk activity tracking fixed and routers re-enabled.
March 30, 2026 · Issue #5
ADP Flow · Company-Wide Messaging · GTM OS Live · Cash Out
Issue #5
▼
⚙️ CS Ops
Updated Process
ADP Updated Subscription Flow
ADP Run integration now uses an updated subscription flow in the ADP Marketplace. Existing customers use a link token to connect; new customers can complete setup without a token and have a Homebase account created automatically. Live 3/17/26. ADP connector fee = $25/month.
Updated Process
Credential Verification Nudges
In-app prompts rolling out encouraging users to verify email and phone ahead of a future move to passwordless sign-in (after May 31, 2026). Persistent nudge on mobile and web that won't dismiss until verified. Audience: OAMs and EEs with unverified email/phone. Live 3/25–3/26.
Updated Feature
Company-Wide Messaging Is Here
Messaging now supports company-wide channels for eligible multi-location businesses. Cleaner UI, unread tab, and location-based filtering. Requires mobile 4.95+. "Entire company" and "All company managers" channels can be enabled separately in settings. Live 4/1.
Experiment
New Web Navigation — New Accounts
New web nav experiment rolling out to 50% of newly created companies on web (Phase 1). Clearer labels, simpler sub-nav, more room for content. Manager-only in Phase 1. No customer comms planned until Phase 2 (May 2026). Enable on staging via leftnav_simplification=1. Live 4/1.
Updated Feature
Enforced 2FA for Payroll Admin
Closes a gap that let some payroll admins access payroll without 2FA. Affected users now prompted to enable 2FA before accessing payroll and bank account actions. Audience: owners/payroll admins, OAMs involved in bank account setup. Live 4/6/26.
📣 PMM
Feature Traction
Teen Scheduling Compliance — 227 Locations
227 Plus & All-in-One locations in US/CA adopted. PMM focused on DOB coverage and Basic/Essentials upgrades. Ask prospects if they employ under-18s and whether DOBs are on file.
Franchise Signal
Scooter's Coffee Conference Insights
GROW conference surfaced strong Hiring Manager product interest from franchise operators. Lead with hiring workflows and vertical-specific collateral.
Experiment Win
Cash Out Web Enrollment ↑ 20%
Latest web experiment hit 20% completion (+3pts vs round 1). QR codes on timeclocks, SMS, and follow-up emails drove conversions. Web-led enrollment motion is improving.
Lifecycle Test
Hiring Assistant Sales CTAs Win
"Connect with a hiring specialist" CTA drove a 16% lift in HA paid conversion. Seasonal hiring test hit a statistically significant 23% lift in job postings. Lead with proof, urgency, and expert access — especially in food & retail.
⚠️ Heads-Up
Messenger V3 pushed to April 1 · Vestwell postponed
Avoid overcommitting timing on either motion until leadership go-ahead is defined.
📊 RevOps
Live — March 25
GTM OS Live for Switcher Team
GTM OS Workspace in Salesforce is now the day-to-day hub for the Switcher motion. Integrates with Talkdesk, Zoom, and Granola to auto-transcribe calls and update stages. Automates same-day follow-ups, nurture cadences, no-show flows, and legacy substage logic. Blitz Mode kicks in for cold-account prospecting when no active opp actions remain.
March 16, 2026 · Issue #4
Vestwell · Payroll Bundles Deadline · Emergency Contact · Google Calendar Hiring · AI SDR
Issue #4
▼
⚙️ CS Ops
Experiment
Payroll Bundles Upgrade Deadline: March 31
Customers still on Payroll Bundles must upgrade by March 31 or move back to regular packaging at $39 base + $6 payroll. The deadline is for the upgrade decision only — customers can still run payroll after March 31. Focus outreach on customers who haven't upgraded yet.
New Feature
Emergency Contact Compliance (CA SB 294)
Arrest/Detention Notification preference added to employee Emergency Contact details for California SB 294 compliance. Phase 1: Web, OAM-only. Field defaults to "Not yet designated." Compliance deadline was March 30, 2026. Plus plan and up. Live 3/13/26.
New Feature
Hiring: Google Calendar Integration
Hiring V2 customers can now connect Google Calendar to avoid interview scheduling conflicts and see upcoming candidate interviews in one place. Previously, interview availability didn't account for existing calendar events. Live 3/16/26 to all Hiring V2 customers.
New Partner
Vestwell 401(k) Partner Update
Homebase replaced Accrue with Vestwell for the 401(k) integration. New customers see Vestwell now; existing customers transition from Accrue starting 3/16/26. Vestwell owns customer outreach for transitions. Contributions sync automatically every pay run through Homebase Payroll.
📣 PMM
Enablement
Scooter's Coffee Enablement Assets
New landing page and franchise flyer created for Scooter's Coffee franchise operators. External assets designed to reduce friction and increase credibility during the franchise sales cycle. Lead with hiring workflows and vertical-specific collateral.
📊 RevOps
Beta Program
AI SDR Program — Small Batch Testing
Small batch test of an AI SDR program to nurture leads and pass opportunities to sales. Training planned for next week or beginning of Q2.
Announcement
GTM OS Coming to Switcher Team — Training March 25
GTM OS launching to Switcher team the following week. Training session Wednesday March 25. Goal: eliminate tab-switching and remove guesswork about what to work next.
Announcement
Dynamic Ownership V2 Live for Inception Teams
DOV2 launched for Inception teams. Training slides shared. Designed to stabilize ownership logic and improve attribution tracking.
March 6, 2026 · Issue #3
Job Creation Flow · Break Penalties · Teen Scheduling · Dynamic Ownership V2
Issue #3
▼
⚙️ CS Ops
Improvement
Updated Job Creation Flow
New streamlined job post creation experience — from multiple screens to one consolidated screen with job details and screener questions. Customers no longer choose specific job boards; they choose "post to all boards" or "internal only via Homebase Career Page." Live 2/17/26 to all Hiring users.
Improvement
Editing Break Penalties Is Back
Managers can once again manually edit break penalties on time cards. Key behavior change: once manually edited, the value is "locked" and won't auto-recalculate from other time card changes unless the break penalty field itself is edited again.
New Feature
Scheduling Compliance for Teens
Homebase now automatically flags shifts conflicting with federal and state child labor laws (hour limits, curfews, school-night restrictions) before the schedule is published. Requires enabling in Settings > Scheduling Enforcement and DOBs on file. DOL violations can reach $15,138/incident. Plus and All-in-One only. Live 3/16/26.
📣 PMM
Note
No PMM Updates This Week
No product marketing updates for March 6.
📊 RevOps
Announcement
Dynamic Ownership V2 Is Here for Inception Teams
DOV2 launched for Inception teams with training slides. Designed to stabilize ownership logic, tighten SLAs, and improve attribution/tracking visibility.
February 20, 2026 · Issue #2
Cash Out Web Experiment · Hiring Re-engagement · CA Break Penalties Campaign
Issue #2
▼
⚙️ CS Ops
Experiment
Cash Out Web Enrollment Experiment
Small experiment testing whether employees who don't use the HB mobile app are interested in Cash Out. Interest-only — does not enroll anyone or set up payouts. Target: ~5–10k employees who have never signed into the Homebase mobile app. If asked for access sooner, confirm if company is Cash Out active; if yes, direct them to the mobile app.
📣 PMM
Campaign
Hiring Assistant Re-engagement (Launched 2/18)
Targeting customers who added a team member 24h prior but never used Hiring Assistant. Goal: drive new job posts.
Campaign
Hiring Day 15 Free Trial (Launched 2/19)
Mid-trial push to boost applicant volume and reinforce unlimited job posts during the free trial period to maximize conversion.
Active Campaigns
CA Break Penalties Campaign (3-Part)
3 distinct campaigns via email & web nudges targeting CA customers: (1) Optimize — Plus/AiO users with feature on. (2) Activate — Plus/AiO users with feature off. (3) Upgrade — Basic/Essential users to move to Plus.
New LCM Test
Basic Plan Onboarding Email
Testing two audiences: post-trial or recent downgraders. Introduces Basic features while cross-selling paid plan benefits. Metric: upgrades to paid.
📊 RevOps
Note
Coming Soon
No RevOps workflow changes this week.
February 17, 2026 · Issue #1
Mobile Requests · Clock Out · Break Auto-Recalc · iOS 16 · Lightspeed · Qualified OT · RevOps Wins
Issue #1
▼
⚙️ CS Ops
Improvement
Mobile App — Consolidated Request Feeds
Refreshed Requests experience consolidating cover, trade, time off, availability, and open shift claims into easy-to-scan feed views. New: OAMs can approve availability on mobile. Filter by location. Covers/trades/open shift claims grouped by shift. Approved/denied items drop off immediately. Live Feb 11–12 after iOS/Android 4.88 hits 100% rollout.
Improvement
Consolidated Clock Out
Merged mobile clock-out experiences into one dynamic shift card. ACO employees can now use "I left work earlier" more consistently and add/waive missed breaks at clock out. Live 2/11/26 to 33K locations with ACO enabled.
Improvement
Break Penalties Auto-Recalc on Time Card Edits
Break penalties now auto-calculated and re-calculated anytime a time card is created or edited. Managers can no longer manually edit break penalty amounts — the system keeps them accurate. Primarily CA locations plus ~142 non-CA companies already with setting enabled. Live 2/18/26.
Improvement
Dropping Partial Support for iOS 16
Starting with iOS v4.90, new Homebase updates require iOS 17+. 8,571 users on iOS 16; 5,224 can upgrade, 3,347 cannot (hardware). If they can upgrade → encourage iOS 17. If they can't → they can keep using current app but cannot reinstall if uninstalled. Mobile web always available. Live ~Feb 24–25.
Improvement
Hiring Dashboard v2
New Hiring dashboard with clearer action items and improved visibility into next steps. Live 2/3 to all hiring customers.
Functionality Update
Lightspeed X/R: HB Connection Unblocked
Lightspeed R-series customers can once again connect to Homebase after being blocked since November 4, 2025. Replaced broken Lightspeed-hosted login page with a direct OAuth flow Homebase controls. Also supports billing transition from Lightspeed to Homebase billing. Live 2/10/26.
New Feature
Qualified Overtime in Timesheets
New "Qualified OT" column in Timesheets to support OBBBA (One Big Beautiful Bill Act) qualified OT deduction rules — FLSA-mandated OT hours (generally 40+/week) for non-exempt employees. In CA, CO, NV, AK, KY — state OT rules may create discrepancies; in-product nudge shown. Live 1/19/26.
📣 PMM
Positioning
CA Compliance: Automated Break Penalties
Talk track: "If you have employees in CA, you're required to pay a premium when breaks are missed. Homebase automates that entirely, so you're never tracking it manually or worrying about legal risk." Plus/All-in-One exclusive — clear upgrade reason for Basic/Essentials CA customers. Target: CA prospects and current Basic/Essentials accounts in CA.
Reminder
NEXT Insurance SPIFF — Ends March 31, 2026
1st: $300 · 2nd: $200 · 3rd: $100. Every Qualified Quoted Lead = 1 entry. Submit via /next lead in #next_homebase-sales. Pitch: "Next is already integrated with our time tracking and payroll, removing manual upload of hours between systems."
📊 RevOps
Live Feb 6
Inbound SMS Ownership
Replies via Mogli SMS now count as a meaningful connect for dynamic ownership security.
Live Feb 9
Spam Reduction
ReCAPTCHA added to Contact Sales forms for cleaner inbound lead flow and less queue noise.
In Testing
Talkdesk Activity Sync
Improved linking between Talkdesk calls and Salesforce Opportunities to eliminate orphaned activities.
In Dev
AI Call Summaries
Automatically structured notes via Talkdesk transcriptions to save rep time and improve CRM data quality. No workflow changes required from sales team yet.
Live Today (2/17)
Payroll Trigger for Self-Serve Opps
Launch timing for Self Serve Opps live while logic debugging for routing accuracy continues.
